description: Perform a class-wide safety audit for CDK4/6 inhibitors using the Liverpool Cancer iChart app. Determine if the interaction with the antibiotic 'Clarithromycin' is a 'Class Effect' (identical severity colors) across Abemaciclib, Palbociclib, and Ribociclib. Create a report at /sdcard/cdk46_class_audit.txt listing the interaction color for each drug and indicating 'YES' if all three colors are identical or 'NO' if they are not.
